user.title: Planet Fitness Check-In
user.description:
Enter the email for your Planet Fitness membership. A 6-digit login code will be sent to that address (same Auth0 passwordless flow as the official app).

{help}

code.title: Enter email code
code.description: Check your inbox for a code sent to **{email}**, then enter it below. The setup wizard waits here until you submit the code.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Planet Fitness / Auth0. Try again.
error.invalid_code: That code is invalid or expired. A new code has been emailed — enter the latest one.
error.redirect_failed: Signed in, but Auth0 redirect handling failed. Try again with a fresh email code.
error.missing_device: Logged in, but no device id is registered. Open the official Planet Fitness app once while logged in, then retry setup.

abort.already_configured: This Planet Fitness account is already configured.
